<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try one action to see if game is still responsive

print("Action result:", result)
print("Game over now:", last_action_result.get('game_over'))
print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))

nodes = seg['nodes']
ring_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] == 16]
yellow_ring = [n for n in ring_nodes if n['color'] == 'Y']
if yellow_ring:
    y = yellow_ring[0]
    print(f"Y position: ({min(r for r,c in y['boundary'])}, {min(c for r,c in y['boundary'])})")
